title: BEM-862 execute 861 route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/roadmap']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:39 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem861_broaden_reapproval_response_filter.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if decision=='APPROVED':
    marker=Path('governance/roadmap/BEM862_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_RESUME.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-862 | Protocol Approved Via Broad Real Response Filter'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+'Source: governance/state/bem861_broaden_reapproval_response_filter.json'+sep+'Next: resume roadmap implementation.'+sep)
    status='approved_resume_marker_created'
    next_action='resume roadmap implementation'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    marker=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem862_extract_latest_real_response_changes.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-862 | Extract Latest Real Response Changes'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: extract concrete changes from latest real Claude response and patch protocol.'+sep)
    status='not_approved_extract_changes_next'
    next_action='extract concrete changes from latest real response and patch protocol'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
else:
    status='no_usable_response_repair_dispatch_next'
    next_action='repair Claude response dispatch/action because broad filter still found no usable approval'
state={'bem':'BEM-862','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem862_execute_bem861_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem862_execute_bem861_route.md').write_text('# BEM-862 | Execute BEM-861 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem862_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-862'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem862_execute_bem861_route.json','governance/reports/bem862_execute_bem861_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem862_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-861 broad-filter route: resume if approved, otherwise extract changes or repair response dispatch')
"""
